title: Taco Stuffed Flour Tortillas
description: Soft flour tortillas stuffed with seasoned beef, cheese, and vegetables, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Cook the ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Once the beef is browned, add the diced onion and bell pepper, and cook until they're softened.
Stir in the taco seasoning and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spoon the beef mixture onto the center of each tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top the beef with shredded cheese and fold the tortillas in half to enclose.
Place the stuffed tortillas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are crispy.
Serve the tacos hot, with sour cream and any other desired toppings.
